sql.if:
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.USER_NO, B.CATEGORY_NO, B.GAME_CODE, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.POST_DATE, B.BOARD_CD, B.READ_COUNT, U.USER_NAME, P.CAPACITY, P.TIER, P.PARTY_CURRENT, P.PREFER_MAP, C.CATEGORY_NAME, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKES L WHERE L.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS likeCount FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON B.USER_NO = U.USER_NO LEFT JOIN PARTY_RECRUIT P ON B.BOARD_NO = P.BOARD_NO LEFT JOIN CATEGORY_TABLE C ON B.CATEGORY_NO = C.CATEGORY_NO WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.BOARD_CD = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_NO,USER_NO,CATEGORY_NO, GAME_CODE, BOARD_CONTENT,BOARD_TITLE, POST_DATE,BOARD_CD,READ_COUNT) VALUES ( #{boardNo},#{userNo},#{categoryNo}, #{gameCode}, #{boardContent},#{boardTitle}, DEFAULT,DEFAULT,DEFAULT)
mapper.select:
SELECT R.*, U.USER_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON R.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE R.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
ORDER BY NVL(NULLIF(R.PARENT_REPLY_NO, 0), R.REPLY_NO) ASC, R.REPLY_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET READ_COUNT = READ_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_CD = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT ( REPORT_NO, USER_NO, BOARD_NO, REPLY_NO, REPORT_CONTENT, REPORT_TYPE, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPORT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{boardNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{replyNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportContent}, #{reportType}, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, U.USER_NAME FROM REPORT R JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON R.USER_NO = U.USER_NO ORDER BY REPORT_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT SET STATUS = 'Y', DONE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO, TITLE, POST_DATE FROM NOTICE ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC
SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_NO = #{noticeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NOTICE_NO,TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT,POST_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTICE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{title},#{noticeContent},SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM PATCHNOTE WHERE PATCHNOTE_NO = #{patchnoteNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PATCHNOTE ( PATCHNOTE_NO, GAME_CODE, TITLE, PATCHNOTE_CONTENT,POST_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_PATCHNOTE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{gameCode}, #{title}, #{patchnoteContent},SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM INQUIRY WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT * FROM INQUIRY ORDER BY CASE WHEN ANSWER_STATUS = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, POST_DATE ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_INQUIRY_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO INQUIRY ( BOARD_NO, USER_NO, USER_NAME, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, REASON, GAME_CODE, POST_DATE,ANSWER_STATUS, ANSWER ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{reason}, #{gameCode}, SYSDATE, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY SET ANSWER = #{answer}, ANSWER_STATUS = 'C' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKES WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY_LIKES WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND REPLY_NO = #{replyNo}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY R JOIN BOARD B ON R.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE R.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND R.STATUS = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_CD = 'Y'
AND B.GAME_CODE = #{gameCode}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T1.* FROM ( SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, U.USER_NAME, B.READ_COUNT AS readCount, B.POST_DATE AS postDate, B.GAME_CODE,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKES L WHERE L.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS likeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY R WHERE R.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO AND R.STATUS = 'Y') AS replyCount,
( SELECT MAX(CHANGE_NAME) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY FILE_NO ASC) FROM ATTACH_FILE F WHERE F.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO ) AS thumbnail
FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON B.USER_NO = U.USER_NO JOIN CATEGORY_TABLE C ON B.CATEGORY_NO = C.CATEGORY_NO
WHERE B.BOARD_CD = 'Y' /* Y: 활성화된 게시글 */ AND C.CATEGORY_NAME = '갤러리'
AND B.GAME_CODE = UPPER(#{gameCode})
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC ) T1 ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY_TABLE C ON B.CATEGORY_NO = C.CATEGORY_NO WHERE B.BOARD_CD = 'Y' AND C.CATEGORY_NAME = '갤러리'
AND B.GAME_CODE = UPPER(#{gameCode})
SELECT CATEGORY_NO FROM CATEGORY_TABLE WHERE GAME_CODE = UPPER(#{gameCode}) AND CATEGORY_NAME = #{categoryName}

SELECT R.INFO_REPLY_NO, R.USER_NO, R.GAME_CODE, R.TARGET_NO, R.PARENT_REPLY_NO, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(R.REPLY_CONTENT, 4000, 1) AS REPLY_CONTENT, R.REPLY_DATE, U.USER_NAME FROM GAME_INFO_REPLY R JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON R.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE R.GAME_CODE = #{gameCode} AND R.TARGET_NO = #{targetNo} AND R.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(R.PARENT_REPLY_NO, R.INFO_REPLY_NO) DESC, R.INFO_REPLY_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GAME_INFO_REPLY ( INFO_REPLY_NO, USER_NO, GAME_CODE, TARGET_NO, REPLY_CONTENT, PARENT_REPLY_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_INFO_REPLY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{gameCode}, #{targetNo}, #{replyContent}, DECODE(#{parentReplyNo}, 0, NULL, #{parentReplyNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}) )
